description: A consultant needs to train a department of 50 end-users on the core features of the product.

nodes.task_description: Customize the standard end-user training deck to include screenshots and examples from the customer's own configured environment.

expected_outcome.value: Consultant tailors the training to be highly relevant to the audience.

nodes.task_description: Deliver the training session in a 'train-the-trainer' format to a group of the customer's team leads.

expected_outcome.value: Consultant effectively enables the customer's champions to train their own teams.

nodes.task_description: Provide a Q&A document and a recording of the session for future reference.

expected_outcome.value: Consultant provides lasting training assets to the customer.
